query: Set up a CI/CD pipeline for our Next.js app that runs tests, checks types, and deploys to Vercel on merge to main.
expected_behavior: Produces a GitHub Actions workflow YAML with separate jobs for: lint, typecheck, test, and deploy
Ensures the deploy job only runs after all test jobs pass (needs: dependency)
Does not commit any environment secrets in the workflow file — uses GitHub Secrets references
Verifies rollback capability: Vercel instant rollback is available, and this is noted in the output
The workflow file is complete and runnable, not pseudocode
